positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a cosmic forest scene. Giant bioluminescent trees with crystalline branches glow in shades of deep sapphire and emerald green. Gentle, floating geometric celestial bodies drift through the void. The overall composition is symmetrical and centered, featuring crisp, defined silhouettes against a gradient nebula backdrop of deep indigo and violet. Use clean vector lines, flat color blocks, and high contrast. Artwork must be optimized for screen printing on apparel, ensuring scalable artwork and clean edges. Inspired by Art Deco and modern celestial maps. --ar 1:1
negative: blurry, grainy, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifact, low resolution, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, photorealism, messy, dirty
